ddls:
CREATE TABLE "books" (
  "book_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the book */,
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the author of the book */,
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the publisher of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the book was published */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "genre" TEXT /* Genre of the book */,
  "language" TEXT /* Language of the book */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in the book */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover (e.g., hardcover, paperback) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the book content */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the book cover */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_publisher_id FOREIGN KEY ("publisher_id") REFERENCES publishers ("publisher_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_books_author_id FOREIGN KEY ("author_id") REFERENCES authors ("author_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "authors" (
  "author_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each author */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the author */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the author */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the author */,
  "birth_year" INTEGER /* Year the author was born */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the author */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the author's official website */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs to the author's social media profiles */,
  "deceased_year" INTEGER /* Year the author passed away, if applicable */,
  "agent_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the literary agent representing the author */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("author_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_authors_agent_id FOREIGN KEY ("agent_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "publishers" (
  "publisher_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each publisher */,
  "publisher_name" TEXT /* Name of the publisher */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the publisher */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the publisher */,
  "established_year" INTEGER /* Year the publisher was established */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the publisher's official website */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the publisher */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* URLs to the publisher's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("publisher_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book sold */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of books sold */,
  "sale_date" TEXT /* Date of the sale */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store where the sale occurred */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the sale (quantity * price) */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stores" (
  "store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each store */,
  "store_name" TEXT /* Name of the store */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the store */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the store */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the store */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the store's official website */,
  "opening_hours" TEXT /* Opening hours of the store */,
  "manager_name" TEXT /* Name of the store manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the store */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the book in stock */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the inventory was last updated */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder should be triggered */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_store_id FOREIGN KEY ("store_id") REFERENCES stores ("store_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, sales analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed version of the user's password for security */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the system */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the system was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the user accessed the system */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the system */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "book_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each book version */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "edition" INTEGER /* Edition number of the book */,
  "publication_year" INTEGER /* Year the edition was published */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the book edition */,
  "isbn" TEXT /* International Standard Book Number */,
  "cover_type" TEXT /* Type of cover for this version */,
  "pages" INTEGER /* Number of pages in this version */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the changes or features in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_book_versions_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customer_preferences" (
  "preference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer preference */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer */,
  "book_id" INTEGER /* ID of the book */,
  "preference_score" REAL /* Score representing the customer's preference for the book */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date and time when the preference was last updated */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the preference data (e.g., user input, purchase history) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("preference_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_book_id FOREIGN KEY ("book_id") REFERENCES books ("book_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_customer_preferences_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "purchase_history" TEXT /* History of purchases made by the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the customer */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date the customer registered */,
  "loyalty_points" INTEGER /* Points accumulated through purchases or other activities */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)
